query: 对比分析易方达和华夏基金的业务结构

args.sql: WITH latest_size AS (SELECT s.fund_code, s.fund_name, s.fund_company, s.asset_type, s.fund_size FROM fund_size s WHERE s.date = (SELECT MAX(date) FROM fund_size) AND s.fund_code IN ('EFUND_CODE', 'CHAM_CODE') LIMIT 2), latest_holding AS (SELECT h.fund_code, h.stock_name, h.holding_quantity, h.holding_value FROM fund_holding h WHERE h.date = (SELECT MAX(date) FROM fund_holding) AND h.fund_code IN ('EFUND_CODE', 'CHAM_CODE') LIMIT 200) SELECT s.fund_code AS "基金代码", s.fund_name AS "基金名称", s.fund_company AS "基金公司", s.asset_type AS "资产类型", s.fund_size AS "基金规模", h.stock_name AS "持仓股票", h.holding_quantity AS "持仓股数", h.holding_value AS "持仓市值" FROM latest_size s LEFT JOIN latest_holding h ON s.fund_code = h.fund_code LIMIT 200;

plan.rationale: 查询两个基金的最新规模信息及其持仓股票，比较其业务结构

notes: 未指定日期，使用最新的规模和持仓数据
查询两个基金的最新规模信息及其持仓股票，比较其业务结构
SQL 由 LLM/规则生成，并经过只读白名单校验和 dry run。

metadata.sql: WITH latest_size AS (SELECT s.fund_code, s.fund_name, s.fund_company, s.asset_type, s.fund_size FROM fund_size s WHERE s.date = (SELECT MAX(date) FROM fund_size) AND s.fund_code IN ('EFUND_CODE', 'CHAM_CODE') LIMIT 2), latest_holding AS (SELECT h.fund_code, h.stock_name, h.holding_quantity, h.holding_value FROM fund_holding h WHERE h.date = (SELECT MAX(date) FROM fund_holding) AND h.fund_code IN ('EFUND_CODE', 'CHAM_CODE') LIMIT 200) SELECT s.fund_code AS "基金代码", s.fund_name AS "基金名称", s.fund_company AS "基金公司", s.asset_type AS "资产类型", s.fund_size AS "基金规模", h.stock_name AS "持仓股票", h.holding_quantity AS "持仓股数", h.holding_value AS "持仓市值" FROM latest_size s LEFT JOIN latest_holding h ON s.fund_code = h.fund_code LIMIT 200;

args.sql:
WITH fund_codes AS (
  SELECT fund_code, fund_name FROM fund_size WHERE fund_name IN ('易方达基金', '华夏基金') LIMIT 2
), latest_size AS (
  SELECT s.fund_code, s.fund_name, s.fund_company, s.asset_type, s.fund_size
  FROM fund_size s
  JOIN fund_codes fc ON s.fund_code = fc.fund_code
  WHERE s.date = (SELECT MAX(date) FROM fund_size WHERE fund_code = s.fund_code)
), latest_holding AS (
  SELECT h.fund_code, h.stock_name, h.holding_quantity, h.holding_value
  FROM fund_holding h
  JOIN fund_codes fc ON h.fund_code = fc.fund_code
  WHERE h.date = (SELECT MAX(date) FROM fund_holding WHERE fund_code = h.fund_code)
)
SELECT
  fc.fund_name AS 基金名称,
  ls.fund_company AS 管理公司,
  ls.asset_type AS 资产类型,
  ls.fund_size AS 规模,
  COUNT(lh.stock_name) AS 持仓股票数
FROM latest_size ls
JOIN fund_codes fc ON ls.fund_code = fc.fund_code
LEFT JOIN latest_holding lh ON ls.fund_code = lh.fund_code
GROUP BY fc.fund_name, ls.fund_company, ls.asset_type, ls.fund_size
LIMIT 200;

), latest_size AS (
  SELECT s.fund_code, s.fund_name, s.fund_company, s.asset_type, s.fund_size
  FROM fund_size s
  JOIN fund_codes fc ON s.fund_code = fc.fund_code
  WHERE s.date = (SELECT MAX(date) FROM fund_size WHERE fund_code = s.fund_code)
), latest_holding AS (
  SELECT h.fund_code, h.stock_name, h.holding_quantity, h.holding_value
  FROM fund_holding h
  JOIN fund_codes fc ON h.fund_code = fc.fund_code
  WHERE h.date = (SELECT MAX(date) FROM fund_holding WHERE fund_code = h.fund_code)
)
SELECT
  fc.fund_name AS 基金名称,
  ls.fund_company AS 管理公司,
  ls.asset_type AS 资产类型,
  ls.fund_size AS 规模,
  COUNT(lh.stock_name) AS 持仓股票数
FROM latest_size ls
JOIN fund_codes fc ON ls.fund_code = fc.fund_code
LEFT JOIN latest_holding lh ON ls.fund_code = lh.fund_code
GROUP BY fc.fund_name, ls.fund_company, ls.asset_type, ls.fund_size
LIMIT 200;

args.sql:
WITH fund_info AS (
  SELECT s.fund_code, s.fund_name, s.fund_company, s.asset_type, s.fund_size, h.stock_name, h.holding_quantity, h.holding_value
  FROM fund_size s
  LEFT JOIN fund_holding h ON s.fund_code = h.fund_code AND s.date = h.date
  WHERE s.fund_name IN ('易方达', '华夏基金') AND s.date = (SELECT MAX(date) FROM fund_size)
)
SELECT
  fund_name AS 基金名称,
  fund_company AS 管理公司,
  asset_type AS 资产类型,
  SUM(fund_size) AS 规模总和,
  GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT stock_name) AS 持仓股票
FROM fund_info
GROUP BY fund_name, fund_company, asset_type
LIMIT 200;

  FROM fund_size s
  LEFT JOIN fund_holding h ON s.fund_code = h.fund_code AND s.date = h.date
  WHERE s.fund_name IN ('易方达', '华夏基金') AND s.date = (SELECT MAX(date) FROM fund_size)
)
SELECT

  fund_company AS 管理公司,
  asset_type AS 资产类型,
  SUM(fund_size) AS 规模总和,
  GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT stock_name) AS 持仓股票
FROM fund_info
GROUP BY fund_name, fund_company, asset_type
LIMIT 200;
